page.title: Playbooks
page.description: Automated conversation flows and responses for your agents

empty.createFirst: Create your first playbook to automate conversations.

form.triggerPlaceholder:
This playbook will be activated when customer says:
 - I need help with my account...
form.triggerHint: Define when this playbook should be activated
form.instructionsHint: Create numbered step-by-step instructions that agents will follow when executing this playbook
form.noAgentsAvailable: No agents available. Create agents first.

create.title: Create New
create.description: Define automated conversation flows for your agents
create.headDescription: Create a new automated conversation playbook

validation.titleMaxLength: Playbook title must be less than 255 characters
validation.triggerMaxLength: Trigger must be less than 255 characters

toast.saveFailed: Failed to {action} playbook. Please try again.
toast.generateFailed: Failed to generate instructions. Please try again.
toast.createFailed: Failed to create playbook. Please try again.

delete.title: Delete Playbook
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

wizard.title: Create Playbook
wizard.description: Follow the steps to create a new playbook

cancelDialog.title: Leave wizard?
cancelDialog.description: Your progress will be lost. Are you sure you want to leave?

successDialog.title: Playbook Created
successDialog.description: Your playbook has been created successfully. What would you like to do next?

purpose.label: What is this playbook for?
purpose.placeholder: e.g. Handle refund requests for orders placed in the last 30 days
purpose.helperText: Describe what this playbook should help resolve or automate. 1–3 sentences recommended.
purpose.tipsFocus: Focus on the specific problem or task this playbook should handle
purpose.tipsMention: Mention who typically needs help with this (e.g. customers, internal team)
purpose.tipsOutcomes: Include any key outcomes you expect (e.g. issue a refund, escalate to manager)

actions.label: What actions can this playbook take?
actions.helperText: Select the tools this playbook is allowed to use. If none are selected, the playbook will be answer-only.
actions.errorLoadTools: Failed to load available tools. Please try again later.
actions.noTools: No integrations are connected yet. This playbook will be answer-only unless you connect integrations in Settings.

documents.label: Which documents should this playbook use?
documents.helperText: Select documents to ground the playbook in your knowledge base. You can skip this step if no documents are needed.
documents.errorLoad: Failed to load documents. Please try again later.
documents.noDocuments: No documents found. You can continue without documents — the playbook will rely only on the instructions you provide.

boundaries.label: Set boundaries and escalation rules
boundaries.helperText: Define when the playbook should escalate to a human and what topics it should avoid.
boundaries.warningText: Clear escalation rules prevent your playbook from handling sensitive situations it shouldn't. Boundaries keep responses focused and safe.
boundaries.escalationPlaceholder: e.g. Customer mentions legal action, requests a refund over $500...
boundaries.boundariesPlaceholder: e.g. Internal company policies, competitor pricing...
boundaries.acknowledgment: I have reviewed the escalation rules and boundaries

generate.readyText: Ready to generate your playbook instructions based on the information you provided.
generate.generatingHint: This may take a few seconds.
generate.startingPointText: This is a starting point. You'll be able to refine everything in the editor.
